_note: Design scaffold — author this pipeline in the Fabric UI once CP-2 (workspace setup) is complete.
_skill: bronze-ingestion-pattern (Pipeline path — Pattern 5: must land source-faithful output, no field renaming during landing)
name: pl_ingest_weather
description: Batch ingestion of hourly weather data from Open-Meteo for Boston and Washington DC. Lands raw JSON to bronze_weather_hourly_raw.

activities.name: ForEach_City
activities.description: Iterate over each city and fetch hourly weather

activities.name: Fetch_Weather
activities.description: Fetch hourly weather from Open-Meteo for one city
activities._note: Open-Meteo returns UTC timestamps natively — no server-side conversion needed

activities.name: Write_To_Bronze
activities.description: Write raw JSON response to bronze_weather_hourly_raw
activities._note: Pipeline must NOT rename or restructure weather fields — bronze-ingestion-pattern anti-pattern

_fallback_note: If pipeline fails during demo, load from src/ingestion/fixtures/bronze/open_meteo_sample.json using load_fixtures.ipynb
